biological_replicate: PPD-CT68 prepared from M. tuberculosis culture
experimental_design: comparative proteomic analysis of various PPD preparations
A comparative proteomic analysis of various PPD preparations and their functional characterization is likely to help in short-listing the relevant antigens...
factor_value: PPD preparation (PPD-CT68, PPD-S2, PPD M. bovis, PPD M. avium)
Out of the 265 proteins identified from PPD-CT68, 142 proteins were found common with PPD-S2, whereas, 123 and 89 proteins were exclusively identified from PPD-CT68 and PPD-S2, respectively.
number_of_biological_replicates: PPD-CT68 prepared from M. tuberculosis culture
